subject: Correction to GCN 520 (IPN annulus for GRB000115)
body:
K. Hurley, reports:

The top edge of the RXTE error box at ssl.berkeley.edu/ipn3/000115 (GCN
520) was incorrectly drawn.  A revised figure has now been posted.
This does not change the IPN/RXTE error box coordinates.  Thanks to J.
Halpern for pointing out this error.
